DASHBOARD.SUBTITLE: Overview of the small apps that will be migrated and added to this repo.
DASHBOARD.TITLE: Project Catalog

TIC_TAC_TOE.TITLE: Tic Tac Toe
TIC_TAC_TOE.SUMMARY: Classic grid game prepared as the first Angular migration target.

CALCULATOR.TITLE: Calculator
CALCULATOR.SUMMARY: Utility app for forms, keyboard events, validation, and clean component state.

HANG_MAN.TITLE: Hang Man
HANG_MAN.SUMMARY: Word game candidate for animations, reactive state, and multilingual labels.

WEATHER.TITLE: Weather App
WEATHER.SUMMARY: API-driven project shell for cards, filters, loading states, and error handling.

MUSIC_EVENT.TITLE: Music Event App
MUSIC_EVENT.SUMMARY: Event listing concept for modals, multi-select filters, and detailed list views.

PROJECT.PLACEHOLDER: The real Angular component for this project will live here.
